questions.question_text: What is the primary reference for information about the course [CT0665] INTRODUCTION TO COMPUTER PROGRAMMING (CT3)?
options: B) The calendar on the university website
C) The Moodle page for the course
questions.explanation: According to the information provided in the PDF, the Moodle page for the course is the primary reference for information about the course, materials, and other details.

questions.question_text: Benchmarks are used to measure the performance of a computer system by running a standardized set of tasks.
questions.explanation: Benchmarks are a common tool used to evaluate the performance of computer hardware and software by running a standardized set of tasks and measuring the results. This allows for a fair comparison between different systems or configurations.
